CustomField.description: Unique Code assigned to this specific event
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is unique key that must be used across the enterprise to maintain automation. The syntax is always "WTR" + Last two digits from the fiscal year of the event + Three letter code usually the nearest airport code + a single digit, normally 1. but could be 2 if there is more than one event at the location in the same fiscal year. Example WTR26TPA1
CustomField.label: EventCode
